### Overview

This Pull Request finalizes the resolution for #9952 by elevating the output of `DreamService.mjs` into a polished, executive-level dashboard for the Strategic Co-Founder persona.

### Architectural Enhancements

- **Dynamic Capability Slicing:** Modified the topological extraction logic to cap all architectural gap vectors (Test, Docs, Guides) at the top 5 occurrences to reduce visual noise, while explicitly capturing the cumulative lengths directly in the Markdown headers (e.g., `5` of `65` items) for high-level observability.
- **Priority Backlog Injection:** Sculpted a robust sub-routine to natively construct the "Latest Priority Backlog." The loop mathematically targets the absolute latest `OPEN` issues array in the workspace SQLite replica and renders their tracking IDs alongside their parsed `labels`.
- **Deduplication Filter:** Hardened the dashboard output by executing a `goldenIds.has(issueId)` filter on the backlog logic so elements featured natively in the Strategic Golden Path are actively bypassed to eliminate redundancies.
- **Label Parsing Integration:** Patched an upstream disconnect in `GraphService` serialization by forcefully routing `meta.labels` through `upsertNode`. Labels like `[needs-re-triage]` are now properly indexed, subsequently allowing the backlog string-interpolation loops to exclude any ticket tagged with negative/blocking QA modifiers.
- **Format Integrity:** Prevented token bleeding and layout collapse by aggressively minimizing extraneous trailing newlines (`\n`) previously produced by overlapping String template concat evaluations within `backlogAppend` and `markdownAppend`. Fixed legacy unit testing misnomers (`Jest`) across the Test capabilities messaging.

Resolves #9952
